name: Mexican Rice Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rice cakes on a baking sheet.
2. Spread refried beans evenly over each rice cake.
3. Top the beans with picante sauce, then add shredded cheese.
4. Sprinkle sliced jalapeno peppers on top.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes.
6. Serve immediately.
Microwave Oven Instructions:
============================
1. Prepare rice cakes as directed on microwave-safe baking sheet.
2. Cook uncovered on HIGH (maximum power) for 1-1/2 minutes, rotating after 1 minute.
3. Serve immediately.
